title: Synopsis Submission Workflow for Deep Learning & RL Module
description: A flowchart depicting the step-by-step process and decision points a student follows to successfully submit their module synopsis.
relationships: Sequential flow from Start through steps to Finalize
'Finalize Synopsis' leads to decision point 'Submit via Portal'
'Submission Accepted?' is a decision diamond: 'Yes' leads to 'End: Submission Complete', 'No' leads to 'End: Revise & Resubmit' which loops back to 'Draft Synopsis Document'
